preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Product Inventory page with the list of products displayed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log in with an invalid username
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service.'; the user remains on the login page

test_cases.test_case: Login with empty username and password fields
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Epic sadface: Username is required.'; the user remains on the login page

test_cases.test_case: Add a product to the cart from the Product Inventory page
preconditions: User is on the Product Inventory page
steps: 1. Click 'Add to cart' for the first product listed
2. Observe the cart badge in the header
test_cases.expected_result: The cart badge count increases by 1; the 'Add to cart' button changes to 'Remove'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to checkout with empty required fields
preconditions: At least one product has been added to the cart
User is on the Shopping Cart page
steps: 2. Leave First Name, Last Name, and Zip/Postal Code fields empty
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed for each missing field; user remains on the Information form

test_cases.test_case: Enter maximum length for Zip/Postal Code
preconditions: At least one product has been added to the cart
User is on the Checkout - Information page
steps: 1. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
2. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
3. Enter '123456789' in the Zip/Postal Code field
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Overview page with the order summary displayed; the system accepts the maximum length input

test_cases.test_case: Complete a full checkout with multiple items in the cart
preconditions: At least two products have been added to the cart
steps: 1. Click the shopping cart icon to navigate to the Shopping Cart page
3. Enter 'Jane' in the First Name field
4. Enter 'Smith' in the Last Name field
5. Enter '12345' in the Zip/Postal Code field
7. Review the order summary on the Overview page
test_cases.expected_result: Confirmation page displays 'Thank you for your order!'; the cart badge is no longer visible

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log out and access protected pages
preconditions: User is on the Product Inventory page
steps: 3. Attempt to navigate back to the Product Inventory page
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page; protected pages are not accessible without logging in again

test_cases.test_case: Reset app state and verify cart is empty
preconditions: At least one product has been added to the cart
User is on the Product Inventory page
steps: 3. Observe the cart badge in the header
test_cases.expected_result: The cart badge count is 0; all 'Add to cart' buttons are reset to their original state
